overall.description: Gameplay footage from GTA V showing nighttime driving across two major bridges. The vehicle traverses a red truss bridge, continues along an elevated highway, crosses a large suspension bridge, and drives through urban highways with the city skyline visible against a dark blue night sky with residual twilight.

scene_state.functional_zone: red steel truss bridge with multi-lane highway

events.description: vehicle enters the red truss bridge structure with steel framework overhead
passing a semi-truck with colorful advertisement in the left lane

agents.ego_description: driving steadily across the red truss bridge, maintaining center lane position

notable_agents.action: large semi-truck with yellow and red advertisement trailer driving parallel in left lane
white box truck driving in the right lane alongside ego vehicle

entered.detail: large red-painted steel truss bridge structure with triangular framework spanning the roadway
concrete highway divider with metal guardrail separating traffic lanes
tall metal lattice tower with multiple high-voltage power lines extending across the scene
tall overhead street lighting illuminating the bridge deck

segments.scene_description: The vehicle drives onto a red steel truss bridge at night, passing under the illuminated red framework. Streetlights cast pools of light on the asphalt while a semi-truck with a colorful advertisement travels in the left lane. Power transmission towers stand silhouetted against the dark blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway between bridges with industrial surroundings

events.description: exits the red truss bridge onto open elevated highway with city lights visible in distance
vehicle navigates a gentle curve in the highway while maintaining speed

agents.ego_description: driving at high speed on the elevated highway, weaving through moderate traffic flow

notable_agents.action: white box truck traveling in the left lane ahead of ego vehicle
sedan with bright headlights approaching from the opposite direction across the divider

entered.detail: tall bridge tower silhouette visible in the distance against the night sky
large low-rise industrial building with minimal exterior lighting

segments.scene_description: Having exited the red bridge, the vehicle travels along an open elevated highway with the suspension bridge tower visible in the distance. The road curves gently through an industrial area with warehouses on the left, while power lines and transmission towers line the route.

scene_state.functional_zone: suspension bridge with cable stays and tall towers

events.description: enters the suspension bridge with massive cable-stayed towers looming ahead
overtakes a large semi-truck while crossing the bridge span
exits the suspension bridge onto the highway descent with metal grate road surface

agents.ego_description: driving across the suspension bridge, passing under the massive bridge towers and through the cable stays

notable_agents.action: large semi-truck with trailer driving in the left lane, overtaken by ego vehicle
box truck traveling ahead on the bridge deck

entered.detail: thick steel suspension cables running from the main tower down to the bridge deck
tall contemporary building with illuminated windows visible beyond the bridge structure

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a massive suspension bridge, driving beneath towering bridge structures and through a web of cable stays. A modern office building with bright windows rises on the left as the vehicle crosses the span, overtaking a semi-truck before exiting onto a metal grate surface.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban highway with commercial buildings and exit ramps

events.description: exits the bridge structure into urban highway environment with commercial buildings
approaches highway exit signs indicating directions to Downtown and Del Perro

agents.ego_description: driving along the urban highway, passing illuminated commercial buildings and approaching exit ramps

notable_agents.action: sedan driving ahead in the same lane, maintaining distance

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the right side of the highway, silhouetted against the night sky
large green overhead highway signs with white text indicating exits and directions
illuminated billboard with red CNT logo mounted on a tall pole

segments.scene_description: Exiting the suspension bridge, the vehicle enters an urban highway lined with palm trees and commercial buildings. A modern office building with extensive lighting passes by on the left as the vehicle approaches overhead highway signs. An illuminated CNT billboard stands prominently on the right side of the road.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive from a structured industrial bridge crossing into a brightly lit urban highway corridor under a dark blue night sky. It begins by passing under the illuminated red framework of a steel truss bridge, where streetlights dot the asphalt and power towers silhouette against the horizon. As the vehicle exits the red bridge, the scene opens onto a curving elevated highway that winds through an industrial zone of warehouses and power lines toward a distant suspension tower. The camera then glides beneath the massive cable stays and towering structures of a suspension bridge, passing a glowing office building before transitioning onto a metal grate surface. Finally, the environment shifts into a dense urban landscape lined with palm trees and commercial buildings, passing a prominent illuminated CNT billboard and overhead highway signs.
